nodes.name: Get Printer Status
nodes.notes:
Connects to the printer via local MQTT and returns a normalized status summary.
Configure the 'Bambu Lab Local' credential with your printer IP, serial, and access code.

nodes.name: Pause Print
nodes.notes:
Example first-class operation to pause a running print.
Disabled by default so it cannot be triggered accidentally.

nodes.name: Resume Print
nodes.notes:
Example first-class operation to resume a paused print.
Disabled by default so it cannot be triggered accidentally.

nodes.name: Cancel Print
nodes.notes:
Example first-class operation to stop the current print.
Disabled by default so it cannot be triggered accidentally.
